title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Hotels is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
